title: God of my life
html: Intro 4x: Cm7 G#7M E|-------------------------------------| B|-------------------------------------| G|-------3---------3--1--0-------------| D|-----5----5--------------------------| A|-3-----------------------------------| E|-------------------------------------| Cm7 G#7M Cm7 G#7M God mine, Father mine Cm7 G#7M Cm7 G#7M My love, mine , all ,reason of all Cm7 G#7M Cm7 G#7M God mine, Air mine Cm7 G#7M Cm7 Lighthouse, the lighthouse that I need, I need, G#7M oh how I need ( Cm7 F7 ) I need to feel you close everyday Cm7 G#7M And look to your light so I could find my way Cm7 F7 My lord you are my true joy G#7M And I need you ... G#7M God of my life Bb9 Cm7 Stay with me G#7M I'm your house Bb9 Cm7 Living with me G#7M Let me only say Bb9 Cm7 What I need Lord G#7M What I need is You ... ( A7M Bb9 C#m7 ) (4x)
